name: MKS Monster8 V2.0
marlin_ref_note: Built from Marlin bugfix-2.1.x. Monster8 uses external stepper drivers; TMC2209 in UART mode is assumed by default.
flash_hint: Copy the firmware .bin to a FAT32 microSD card, insert it into the board, and power-cycle. It flashes on boot.
notes: External (pluggable) stepper drivers; defaults assume TMC2209 in UART mode. Change drivers to match your modules if different.
